blocker.message: The project needs to belong to an organization to manage DataPolicies.

official_requirements_checked: BigQuery masking requires Data Catalog and BigQuery Data Policy APIs.
Policy-tag masking creates or uses a taxonomy and policy tag, creates a data policy, assigns users the BigQuery Masked Reader role and sets the policy tag on a column.
BigQuery Data Policy API creation requires data policy permissions and the target project/account shape must allow DataPolicies.
next_action: Rerun this smoke in a Google Cloud project attached to an organization, then validate masked-reader and fine-grained-reader behavior with the same restricted service account pattern used by the row access policy smoke.
superseded_reason: The same masking gate passed in the organization-backed ContractForge project after direct column data policy creation, column attachment and service-account enforcement.
non_claims: GCP governance parity is not complete while data masking and policy tags are blocked.
The row access policy smoke remains valid and separate from column masking behavior.
